healthcare-it.body:
Healthcare IT Services

HIPAA-aligned IT support, cloud, security, and continuity—built for clinics and healthcare teams.

What We Help With

  • HIPAA-aligned security baseline and access controls
  • HPE private cloud or hybrid cloud for sensitive workloads
  • Backup/DR planning and recovery testing
  • Device lifecycle management and secure disposal

Pricing

Healthcare IT Core

Managed IT designed for healthcare workflows.

Custom monthly

  • Security-first support
  • Backup + continuity
  • User onboarding/offboarding
  • Quarterly reviews

Final pricing depends on scope, users, locations, and compliance requirements.

Book a Healthcare IT Consult

Frequently Asked Questions — Healthcare IT & HIPAA Compliance

Do you provide HIPAA compliant IT services for medical practices?

Yes. IT Legends LLC is a managed IT company for healthcare delivering HIPAA compliant IT services across Illinois. We provide HIPAA-aligned infrastructure, encrypted backup, email security, and compliance monitoring for solo practices, therapists, and medical offices.

Can IT Legends manage IT for accounting firms as well?

Yes. Beyond healthcare, IT Legends LLC also provides managed IT services for accounting firms — securing financial data, managing Microsoft 365, and ensuring compliance-ready IT infrastructure for CPA and advisory firms across Illinois.

accounting-it.body:
Accounting & Financial IT Services

Secure, reliable IT for accounting firms—built for client data protection and seasonal peaks.

What We Help With

  • Secure collaboration (Microsoft 365) and device policies
  • Hybrid cloud for file systems and line-of-business apps
  • Business continuity and data protection
  • Vendor and licensing optimization

Pricing

Accounting IT Core

Stable IT operations for professional services.

Custom monthly

  • Secure workstation policies
  • Backup + DR options
  • User lifecycle management
  • Quarterly roadmap review

Final pricing depends on scope, users, locations, and compliance requirements.

Book an Accounting IT Consult

Frequently Asked Questions — IT Services for Accounting Firms

Why do accounting firms need specialized managed IT services?

Accounting firms handle highly sensitive financial data subject to strict compliance requirements. IT Legends LLC provides managed IT services for accounting firms that includes secure Microsoft 365 configurations, encrypted data storage, email security, and audit-ready IT documentation — protecting your firm and your clients.

What IT services does IT Legends provide for CPA firms in Illinois?

We provide full managed IT for accounting and CPA firms including Microsoft 365 management, endpoint security, backup and disaster recovery, helpdesk support, and IT strategy advisory — all tailored to the compliance needs of financial services professionals.

manufacturing-it.body:
Manufacturing & Industrial IT

Reliable, secure IT infrastructure for manufacturing, logistics, and industrial operations.

How IT LEGENDS Supports Manufacturing

  • Network reliability — stable switching, Wi‑Fi, and segmentation for operations
  • Security-first access — MFA, device policies, and least-privilege controls
  • Hybrid cloud — private/hybrid options for ERP, file systems, and line‑of‑business apps
  • Backup & DR — continuity planning to minimize downtime and data loss
  • Device lifecycle — standardized builds and secure disposal

Common Use Cases

  • Multi-site plants and warehouses needing consistent support
  • ERP/MRP availability and secure remote access
  • Shop-floor vs office network separation
  • Ransomware resilience and rapid recovery requirements

Typical Engagements

Operational Reliability Package

Monitoring + patching + support for critical systems.

Custom monthly

  • Endpoint + server management
  • Alerting and remediation workflow
  • Network health checks
  • Quarterly reviews

Continuity & Recovery Package

Backups and DR planning to reduce downtime.

Custom monthly

  • Backup policy and monitoring
  • Recovery runbooks
  • Tested restore process
  • Risk-based improvements
Discuss Manufacturing IT Explore Full Services
